validator_prompt: Review the SolidWorks interface evaluation for evidence quality. Approve only if it distinguishes verified behavior from README claims, includes live drawing-tool test results, and ends with a practical recommendation for a future agent-facing interface.

architect_review.summary: The findings distinguish live-tested SolidWorks behavior from README-only claims, include concrete drawing creation/export evidence on the sample part, and end with a practical hybrid recommendation for a future agent-facing interface.
